title: DummyJSON versioning contract (authored for the versioning-behavior task)
description: Each endpoint is documented as exposing a current version (v2) and a deprecated version (v1), with v0/v99/vbeta unsupported. The v2 response schema declares one field (schema_diff_field) the v1 schema omits. Agents construct the versioning test plan from this; ground truth is the live API's observed behavior. DummyJSON is read-only and never modified, and in fact implements no versioning — the genuine QA finding this task surfaces.

per_version_response_schemas.note: Authored per (version, endpoint) by versioning_spec.schema_for at run time; v2 adds the schema_diff_field, v1 omits it.
